common.footer: Results are documented case evidence, not guaranteed outcomes.

home.headline: Find Nano-Gro results by problem, crop, country, evidence, and ROI.
home.lede: A searchable proof database built for rapid publication of documented agricultural cases and diagnostic lead capture.

cases.metadataDescription: Search published Nano-Gro cases by problem, crop, country, evidence level, completeness score, ROI, and result.
cases.title: Published case studies
cases.description: Only published cases are shown. Sort priority is most complete first.
cases.disclaimer: This report is based on documented field evidence. Some technical details not available in the original report were conservatively estimated by the technical team for guidance purposes and remain subject to confirmation.
cases.roiNotCalculated: ROI not calculated due to incomplete baseline data.
cases.summaryFallback: Documented Nano-Gro field case prepared for technical review.
cases.visualOnlyResult: Visual improvement documented. Quantified yield data not reported.
cases.technicalStructured: Technical details are structured for publication.
cases.relatedAvailable: related documented cases are available below.
cases.relatedFallback: Related case matching will improve as more cases are published.
cases.requestDiagnosisBody: Submit your crop, hectares, problem, and objective to receive a case-based recommendation.

technicalSheets.metadataDescription: Nano-Gro technical sheets and supporting documents prepared for agronomic and commercial review.
technicalSheets.title: Technical sheets
technicalSheets.description: Product and technical documents are preserved here as technical support material for agronomic review, case validation, and commercial follow-up.
technicalSheets.graphicTitle: How it works in the field
technicalSheets.salesUseTitle: How to use this sheet to sell
technicalSheets.salesUseBody: Use this page to explain the product with clear technical language: start with the producer's problem, then the expected plant response, then the application protocol, and finally the available evidence. Avoid guaranteed-result claims; sell with technical support, follow-up, and documented cases.

caseReport.roiNotCalculated: ROI not calculated due to incomplete baseline data.
caseReport.summaryFallback: Documented Nano-Gro field case prepared for technical review.
caseReport.visualOnlyResult: Visual improvement documented. Quantified yield data not reported.
caseReport.technicalStructured: Technical details are structured for publication.
caseReport.relatedAvailable: related documented cases are available below.
caseReport.relatedFallback: Related case matching will improve as more cases are published.
caseReport.requestDiagnosisBody: Submit your crop, hectares, problem, and objective to receive a case-based recommendation.

diagnostic.title: Get a recommendation for your crop
diagnostic.description: Tell us your current situation and a Nano-Gro specialist will help you find similar cases and a possible strategy.
diagnostic.submittedText: Review these published cases while the team prepares a recommendation.
diagnostic.formTitle: Get a recommendation for your crop
diagnostic.formSubtitle: Tell us your current situation and a Nano-Gro specialist will help you find similar cases and a possible strategy.
diagnostic.name: Name
diagnostic.comments: Tell us more about your situation
diagnostic.consent: I agree to be contacted about Nano-Gro case recommendations.

admin.importDescription: CSV import validates rows first. Valid rows can then be converted into draft cases only.
admin.name: Name
admin.publicationWarning: This case cannot be published until it has at least one evidence asset, approved testimonial, or technical validation.

caseForm.title: Title
caseForm.manualEvidenceNote: File matching is intentionally manual for this MVP. Use these references to attach photos, videos, PDFs, and documents in Evidence.

hero.title: Find Nano-Gro results by crop, country, and problem
hero.subtitle: Every case in this database is documented field evidence: what was applied, what was measured, and how strong the proof is. Find yours.
hero.problem: What is happening to your crop

aggregate.title: What the published evidence says
aggregate.verifiedExplainer: Verified means agronomist-reviewed, lab-supported, or third-party validated.
aggregate.note: Averages calculated over published cases only. Sample size (n) is shown beside every figure. This is documented evidence, not guaranteed results.

problemFirst.title: Start with what you see in the field
problemFirst.subtitle: You do not need to know the product. Pick the problem you are seeing.

homeSections.featuredTitle: Cases with the most complete evidence
homeSections.galleryTitle: Before and after, in the field
homeSections.galleryBody: Field photography linked to its full case and its confidence score.
homeSections.roiTitle: What it could mean on your farm
homeSections.roiBody: Estimate additional production, additional revenue, and an ROI range from the documented cases for your crop.
homeSections.mapBody: Published cases by country. Open any country to see its crops, problems, and results.
homeSections.diagnosticTitle: Get a free diagnostic for your crop
homeSections.diagnosticBody: Eight short questions. When you finish you see cases similar to yours, the likely category of your problem, and a preliminary recommendation. Before anyone calls you.
homeSections.distributorBody: If you distribute agricultural inputs, this case database is your sales material: documented results by crop, country, and problem.
homeSections.productsBody: All the evidence in this database comes from field application of Nano-Gro and Tierra Fértil products. Their technical sheets, with recommended dose and protocol, are published and available.

facets.title: Filter
facets.hasMediaLabel: Only cases with photos or video

caseDetail.relatedBody: Farmers with similar conditions achieved these documented results.
caseDetail.relatedEmptyBody: As more cases for this crop and problem are published, they will appear here.
caseDetail.ctaBodyContext: This case is {crop} in {country}. Tell us how your crop is doing and we will send back cases similar to yours and a preliminary recommendation.
caseDetail.ctaBody: Tell us how your crop is doing and we will send back cases similar to yours and a preliminary recommendation.
caseDetail.roiPrompt: Estimate ROI for my farm using this case as reference
caseDetail.dosageFromSheet: The original report did not record the exact dose. Check the recommended dose in the product technical sheet.
caseDetail.confirmWithTeam: Any dose must be confirmed with the technical team before application: it depends on the crop, the stage, and your field conditions.

gallery.metadataDescription: Visual field evidence from documented Nano-Gro cases, by crop, country, problem, and stage.
gallery.title: Before and after
gallery.subtitle: Every image links to its full case and shows its confidence score. Only evidence with approved consent is published.
gallery.emptyTitle: No visual evidence matches these filters
gallery.emptyBody: Try removing a filter, or browse all documented cases.

roi.metadataDescription: Estimate additional production, additional revenue, and an ROI range from documented Nano-Gro cases for your crop.
roi.title: What it could mean on your farm
roi.subtitle: The estimate uses the improvement range observed in documented cases for your crop. No number on this page is a promise.
roi.yieldUnit: In whatever unit you use (kg, qq, ton). The result comes back in the same unit.
roi.comparableTitle: Comparable cases used for this estimate
roi.comparableBody: The estimate is based on these documented cases. Open any of them to see its evidence.
roi.disclaimer: Estimate based on comparable documented cases. This is not a guaranteed result: the real outcome depends on your soil, climate, variety, and management.
roi.noComparableTitle: No documented cases for that crop yet
roi.noComparableBody: With no comparable cases we calculate nothing: we would rather not hand you an invented number. Request a diagnostic and the technical team will review your situation.
roi.leadTitle: I want a technician to review this estimate
roi.leadBody: We send your calculation along with the enquiry so the team does not start from zero.

compare.title: Compare cases
compare.subtitle: Up to three cases, side by side.
compare.emptyTitle: You have not selected any case
compare.emptyBody: Tick 'Compare' on any case in the listing and come back here.

diagnosticFlow.metadataDescription: Eight short questions. Get similar cases, the likely category of your problem, and a preliminary recommendation.
diagnosticFlow.title: Free diagnostic for your crop
diagnosticFlow.subtitle: Eight short questions. When you finish you see cases similar to yours and a preliminary recommendation, before anyone calls you.

steps.country: Which country is your crop in?
steps.problem: What is happening to your crop?
steps.production: What is your current production per hectare?
steps.objective: What do you want to achieve?
steps.whatsapp: Which WhatsApp number should we reply to?

hints.production: In whatever unit you use. If you do not know it, leave it empty.
hints.email: Optional, but it speeds up sending the report.

diagnosticFlow.consent: I agree to be contacted by Nano-Gro about this enquiry.
diagnosticFlow.resultIntro: This is what the documented evidence says about a situation like yours. A technician will review it with you.
diagnosticFlow.recommendationApplication: In the documented cases closest to yours, the most frequent application was: {application}
diagnosticFlow.recommendationRange: Those cases reported improvements between {low}% and {high}%.
diagnosticFlow.recommendationNoData: The cases closest to yours do not have a published improvement figure yet.
diagnosticFlow.noMatchesTitle: We do not have published cases like yours yet
diagnosticFlow.noMatchesBody: We are not going to invent a result for you. A technician will review your case and get back to you with what we can actually back up.
diagnosticFlow.disclaimer: Preliminary diagnostic based on comparable documented cases. It does not replace a technical visit and does not guarantee results.
diagnosticFlow.sendToTeamTitle: Send your diagnostic to the technical team
diagnosticFlow.sendToTeamBody: Your answers are already inside the message. The team receives it complete and replies on WhatsApp.

hub.emptyBody: As new cases are documented and reviewed, they will appear here. In the meantime, you can look at evidence from similar conditions.
hub.consultBody: Tell us how your crop is doing and we will send back similar cases and a preliminary recommendation.

combo.description: Documented Nano-Gro cases for {a} and {b}, with evidence level and confidence score.
combo.emptyTitle: No published cases for this combination yet
combo.emptyBody: We do not have documented evidence crossing these two criteria yet. Look at the evidence for each one separately.

whatsapp.caseMessage: Hello Nano-Gro team, I am looking at the case "{title}" ({crop} in {country}) and I want to know if it applies to my crop.
whatsapp.genericMessage: Hello Nano-Gro team, I am browsing the case evidence and I would like a recommendation for my crop.
whatsapp.roiMessage: Hello Nano-Gro team, I ran an ROI estimate for {crop} and I would like a technician to review it.

a.name: Complete
a.description: Level A: complete productive data, before and after photos, measurements, and agronomist or technical validation.

b.name: Partial with imagery
b.description: Level B: partial productive data supported by visual evidence.

c.name: Testimonial
c.description: Level C: documented testimonial with some supporting context.

d.name: Field note
d.description: Level D: anecdotal case or early field note. Useful as reference, weaker as public proof.

confidence.title: Confidence score
confidence.why: Why this case scores what it scores
confidence.disclaimer: The score reflects the documented evidence available for this case. It is not a guarantee of results.

checklist.productiveData: Measured productive data (yield, quality, or disease)

metrics.aggregateDisclaimer: Averages calculated over published cases only. Sample size is shown beside every figure. These are not guaranteed results.

seo.defaultDescription: Search documented Nano-Gro agricultural cases by problem, crop, country, evidence, and ROI.
seo.ogDescription: Documented Nano-Gro results, evidence, and diagnostic lead capture.

team.metadataDescription: The technical team that signs and supervises Nano-Gro field reports.
team.title: Technical team
team.subtitle: Behind every report in this database there is a technician who signs it. These are their names, their credentials, and the specific cases they supervised.
team.signedBody: Their name appears signing or supervising the original report of each of these cases. The document is downloadable from the case page.

technology.metadataTitle: Nano-Gro technology and Tierra Fértil Minerals
technology.metadataDescription: What Nano-Gro is, how it works, field-measured results, institutional validations, and certifications. With downloadable technical sheets.
technology.title: Technology
technology.claimsNote: These are NG Caribbean's claims about what the product does. They are a commercial proposition, not guaranteed results nor figures measured on your farm.
technology.resultsTitle: What was measured in the field
technology.resultsNote: Every figure comes from a report with its crop, its place, and its date. Click any of them to see the full case and download the original document.
